_doc: Per-industry applicability map for scoring categories. REWRITTEN 2026-06-08 for the 18-cat consolidated taxonomy (PR: feat(taxonomy): consolidate 34 cats → 18). Keys = the 18 distinct `cat` values produced by scripts/recategorize-companies.mjs. Values: `na` lists scoring categories that are NOT APPLICABLE for that industry (renders 'Not Applicable for this Industry' in PR-3, excluded from grade math). Unlisted categories are implicitly applicable. The reflag script (scripts/reflag-categories.mjs) consumes this map. SAFE DEFAULT: when in doubt, leave a category applicable — a false-positive `na` is worse UX than a low-confidence score. Per-company overrides for edge cases (e.g. retailers that DO sell firearms) live in public/data/_meta/category-applicability-overrides.json (consumed by reflag in a future PR).

_rules.guns: NA for every industry EXCEPT [Sports & Outdoor, Defense & Aerospace]. A handful of mass-market retailers (Walmart, Bass Pro, etc.) DO sell firearms — those are handled via per-company overrides, not this map.
_rules.health: NA for every industry EXCEPT [Food & Beverage, Healthcare, Beauty & Personal Care, Grocery, Hospitality] — the cats whose companies sell physical things humans ingest / put on bodies / use medically.
_rules.animals: NA for non-physical-product cats: [Technology, Financial Services, Professional Services, Entertainment & Media, Energy & Utilities]. These industries don't sell physical products that involve animal testing or animal-derived ingredients.
_rules.execPay: Handled by reflag script at per-company level, not industry — driven by ticker/isPublic presence.
_rules.dei: Handled per-company by reflag script — driven by deiBadges presence and sec-def14a-augment.
_rules.charity: Handled per-company by reflag script — driven by corporate-giving-augment.json membership.
_rules.transparency: Handled per-company by reflag script — driven by transparency-benchmarks-augment.json or wikirate-augment.json membership.
_rules.environment_inferred: Handled per-company by reflag script — when narrative is 'No public record found' AND industry-carbon-intensity-augment.json has a sector for the company's cat, mark environment as {_inferred:true, basis:<cat>}.
